key_themes: Margin expansion and profit growth (EBITDA +11%, margins to 29%) despite flat revenue
Insider buying on post-results weakness (CEO and Chairman purchases)
Bullish analyst consensus with 50%+ average upside (Buy ratings, targets ~£3.30–£4.80 vs ~£2.60 share price)
Strong pipeline of 15+ new games/apps, digital shift, and strategic partnerships (Netflix, Apple, M&A)
Short-term volatility in small-cap gaming stock after FY2025 results
summary: Everplay Group (EVPL.L / Everplay, formerly associated with Team17) reported solid FY2025 results with flat revenue at £166m but strong gross margin improvement (+4.4pts), adjusted EBITDA up 11% to £48.5m, higher profit before tax, a healthy cash position, and a maintained FY26 outlook. Shares fell 13–16% on the flat top-line reaction but insiders stepped in with notable purchases and analysts retained Buy ratings with substantial price targets implying over 50% upside. Sentiment is positive overall, centered on value, operational progress in digital gaming, and a promising release pipeline, with recent portfolio mentions showing price recovery.
sources: 10–15 relevant X posts (Mar–Apr 2026) on results, insider buys, and portfolio gains, 15+ news/RNS items (Yahoo Finance, Proactive Investors, Investegate, company announcements, Simply Wall St), Analyst notes from Jefferies, Berenberg, Barclays, RBC, and others (Mar–Apr 2026)
